testcase.name: testAcceptReservation_ConsultationCreationFails
testcase.system-out: ========== Starting consultation creation process ========== Reservation ID: 1 Provider ID: 2 Patient ID: 1 Reservation Date: 2026-04-27T19:27:58.006625800 Time Slot: 10:00 Consultation Start: 2026-04-27T10:00 Consultation End: 2026-04-27T11:00 Sending consultation request to service: patientId: 1 providerId: 2 description: Consultation scheduled from reservation #1 startTime: 2026-04-27T10:00:00 endTime: 2026-04-27T11:00:00 title: Consultation - Patient 1 type: ONLINE ========== Consultation creation failed, but reservation was accepted ==========
testcase.system-err: Runtime error from consultation service: Consultation service unavailable java.lang.RuntimeException: Consultation service unavailable at testcase.name: testAcceptReservation_Success
testcase.system-out: ========== Starting consultation creation process ========== Reservation ID: 1 Provider ID: 2 Patient ID: 1 Reservation Date: 2026-04-27T19:27:58.096626300 Time Slot: 10:00 Consultation Start: 2026-04-27T10:00 Consultation End: 2026-04-27T11:00 Sending consultation request to service: patientId: 1 providerId: 2 description: Consultation scheduled from reservation #1 startTime: 2026-04-27T10:00:00 endTime: 2026-04-27T11:00:00 title: Consultation - Patient 1 type: ONLINE Consultation service response received: id: 100 title: Consultation Consultation created with ID: 100 ✓ Consultation successfully linked to reservation ========== Consultation creation completed successfully ==========
